case_title: SAMOULIDES JEANNETTE VS GERALD BARRY DORFMAN, ESQ.

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GERALD BARRY DORFMAN, ESQ.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $104.36 FILED BY SAMOULIDES JEANNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT GERALD BARRY DORFMAN, ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GERALD BARRY DORFMAN, ESQ.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMOULIDES JEANNETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GERALD BARRY DORFMAN, ESQ. $104.36 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $133.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GERALD BARRY DORFMAN, ESQ.
